expectations.text: The output creates or proposes a reusable migration script that reads configuration from environment variables.
expectations.evidence: Report says it created copy-seo-title-to-meta-title.mjs and lists env var fallbacks.

expectations.text: The migration defaults to dry-run and requires an explicit execute flag or equivalent for writes.
expectations.evidence: Report says dry run by default and only writes with --execute.

expectations.text: The script builds targeted patches and does not embed tokens or project secrets.
expectations.evidence: Report says it never prints token values and created mutation-sample.json. It hardcodes fallback project/dataset values, but those are not token secrets.

uncertainties: Baseline noticed the repo uses blog-article, but may rely on obsolete token aliases after MIGRATION_TOKEN was renamed. Human review should compare portability.
